meaning: adj.不能破坏的,不可毁灭的
examples: The human spirit is virtually indestructible.
This type of plastic is almost indestructible.
Moulded plastic is almost indestructible, but scuffs easily.
Not even the indestructible quartz surface will probably be able to shield the kibbutz from the tide of history.
Solo's indestructible red plastic cup showed up in the 1970s, when Solo also diversified into disposable plates and bowls.
